next_unlock_sequence: Use exact public email routes for Ulster KTP, Innovate UK support, Belfast Harbour, NI Maritime, and Navantia only after exact action-time approval for each payload hash and destination.
Use the verified QUB KTP public form route or re-verify the queued mailbox before any QUB external send.
Use the verified Artemis contact form only after exact action-time approval and browser readback of the final payload.
After any partner reply, signed role confirmation, site/asset permission, budget, or lead evidence arrives, re-run Gmail/Drive/local evidence readback before returning to IFS portal drafting.
Do not mark any P1 IFS route submit-ready until the required lead, partner, budget, asset/site, permission, and commitment evidence is present in the Aureon ledger.
controls: No email, contact form, upload, invite, portal mutation, or legal submission was performed.
No route was marked direct-submit-ready from drafts, assumptions, or internal planning text.
Plaintext passwords, tokens, tax files, banking data, and private finance values were not copied into this artifact.
